compatibility_rules: required export names remain stable within stdlib major version 1
result tag numeric identity remains stable within stdlib major version 1
text/data helper meaning remains count-and-presence preserving within stdlib major version 1
helpers may grow additively, but exported families must not move between modules without updating the checked-in contracts
advanced helper family ownership remains tied to objc3.concurrency objc3.keypath and objc3.system within stdlib major version 1
strict-system helper exposure remains profile-gated and must not be widened into core claims without a checked-in contract update

core_semantics.option_unwrap_or: returns value when presence flag is nonzero, otherwise fallback
core_semantics.string_view_length: returns the provided unit count unchanged
core_semantics.string_view_prefix_units: returns requested units clamped to the provided unit count and zero floor
core_semantics.byte_span_length: returns the provided byte count unchanged
core_semantics.byte_span_prefix_length: returns requested units clamped to the provided byte count and zero floor
core_semantics.array_count: returns the provided element count unchanged
core_semantics.array_prefix_count: returns requested elements clamped to the provided element count and zero floor
core_semantics.map_entry_value_or: returns value when presence flag is nonzero, otherwise fallback

error_semantics.result_is_ok: returns 1 only when tag equals result_ok_tag
error_semantics.option_to_result_tag: maps nonzero presence to result_ok_tag and zero presence to result_err_tag
error_semantics.result_bridge_diagnostic: returns 0 when option presence matches the provided result tag, otherwise 30601
error_semantics.result_unwrap_or: returns value only when tag equals result_ok_tag, otherwise fallback
error_semantics.result_error_or: returns code only when tag equals result_err_tag, otherwise fallback
error_semantics.ok_or_code: returns value when nonzero, otherwise fallback
error_semantics.or_throw_code: returns value when nonzero, otherwise fallback
error_semantics.text_data_compatibility_diagnostic: returns 0 when unit_count equals byte_count, otherwise 30602

keypath_semantics.component_count: returns root plus offset until runtime-backed keypath storage lands
keypath_semantics.text_compatibility_diagnostic: returns 0 when text_units is at least component_count, otherwise 30603
keypath_semantics.typed_keypath_metadata: remains count-and-component preserving until runtime-backed keypath metadata lands
keypath_semantics.reflection_interop: must preserve the caller-visible keypath component count and diagnostic behavior across module boundaries
keypath_semantics.runtime_composition_adapter: must not invent ownership or allocation semantics beyond the checked-in keypath component and compatibility helpers

concurrency_semantics.spawn_token: returns seed plus 1 as the current deterministic child-spawn token placeholder
concurrency_semantics.cancellation_checkpoint: returns 1 when the provided flag is nonzero and 0 otherwise
concurrency_semantics.family_growth_rule: structured-child-spawn detached-spawn join-and-wait task-group-scope cancellation-observation and executor-hop helpers may grow additively inside objc3.concurrency
concurrency_semantics.layering_rule: objc3.concurrency may depend only on objc3.core and objc3.errors within stdlib major version 1

system_semantics.resource_token: returns seed plus 4 as the current deterministic strict-system resource token placeholder
system_semantics.profile_gate: objc3.system helpers remain reserved for Strict System claims and must not become unconditional Core imports
system_semantics.runtime_composition_hook: strict-system runtime-composition helpers must be explicit profile-gated entrypoints rather than implicit side effects in core helpers
system_semantics.layering_rule: objc3.system may depend on objc3.core objc3.errors objc3.concurrency and objc3.keypath but those modules may not depend on objc3.system

non_goals: runtime-backed string or bytes storage in M306-B001
claiming runtime-backed executor or reflection semantics before the checked-in helper exports exist
widening strict-system helpers into always-on core imports
